title: MSCE Pune Scholarship Result 2026

detail.title: MSCE Pune Scholarship Result 2026
detail.short_info: MSCE Pune Scholarship Result 2026 Released for Class 5th & 8th on the official website - puppssmsce.in on 18-05-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the MSCE Pune Scholarship result.

content.text: MSCE Pune has officially released the Scholarship Result 2026 for Class 5th (PUP) and Class 8th (PSS) examinations. Students who appeared for the scholarship exam can now check their results online through the official portal. MSCE Pune Scholarship Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - https://puppssmsce.in/.

The result is available for primary (Class 5) and upper primary (Class 8) students across Maharashtra who participated in the scholarship exam. Students need to enter their login credentials such as seat number or application details to access and download their results.
Students are advised to carefully verify all the details mentioned in the result and contact the concerned authorities in case of any discrepancies.

MSCE Pune has published the Class 5th and 8th Scholarship Results for the 2026 academic session on its official website. Students can easily check and download their results online using their seat number or login credentials from the official portal.

rows: Maharashtra State Council of Examination (MSCE), Pune

content.text: MSCE Pune has activated the direct link to check the Scholarship Result 2026 for Class 5th and 8th students. Candidates can access their results instantly through the official website using the link provided below.

sections.heading: How to Check MSCE Pune Scholarship Result 2026

content.text: Follow these simple steps to check your MSCE Pune Scholarship Result 2026 online:

items: Click on the link "PUP PSS Scholarship Result 2026"
Enter your seat number or required login credentials
Submit the details to view your result
Download and save the result for future reference
